aesthetic.audience: Vietnamese TikTok viewers, casual PC users
aesthetic.one_job: Teach 3 lesser-known Windows shortcuts fast enough to earn a follow
aesthetic.signature_device: Oversized physical keycaps that visibly press down at the moment each shortcut is introduced
aesthetic.aesthetic_risk: Keycap depth could read as flat buttons if the press motion and shadow are too subtle
aesthetic.anti_template_check: Rejected the generic centered gradient title-card sequence; replaced with a recurring physical keycap-press device, one accent color per tip, and alternating vertical layout positions

scenes.visual_focus: Stacked oversized type with a floating row of decorative keycaps

copy: Dán lại mọi thứ bạn đã copy trước đó
scenes.visual_focus: Keycap combo pressed at center, description below
scenes.layout: keycap row center, description card below

copy: Kéo chọn vùng, ảnh tự lưu vào clipboard
scenes.visual_focus: Three-key combo pressed higher in frame, description card lower
scenes.layout: keycap row high, description card low

copy: Chèn emoji vào bất kỳ ô nhập nào
Follow để xem thêm mẹo mỗi ngày
scenes.visual_focus: Keycap combo with smiley mark, CTA bar slides up at the end
scenes.layout: keycap row center, CTA bar bottom

layout_boxes.visual_box: center band y 640..1280 for keycap rows
layout_boxes.caption_box: none (no burned captions in this composition)

roles.title: scene headline, 104px, weight 900
roles.label: keycap legend and scene counter chip, 48-64px, weight 800

background.rationale: dark navy desktop-at-night base, high contrast for type

accent_tip3.rationale: per-tip accent variation, tip 3 and CTA

motion_budget.moving_groups: scene inner container, keycap row, description card / CTA bar
motion_budget.meaning: the keycap press marks the exact moment the shortcut is executed; the ring pulse is its impact

scene_variation: hook is stacked type with a floating key row; tip scenes alternate keycap-row vertical position (center / high / center) and accent color per tip; the final scene adds a CTA bar that slides up from the bottom

audio.tts: Gemini TTS (gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts, voice Kore), 4 clips mixed at scene offsets +0.25s
